base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_player_lives_indicator — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. Small player-fighter icon placed at bottom-left HUD. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small player-fighter icon placed at bottom-left HUD; one per remaining life
